sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: fit cumulative probability distribution (LOC, SCALE, SKEW, KURT) to historical trades, calculate optimal f (0.206 example), then size contracts as Account Equity / (Account Equity × optimal_f). Distribution bounded ±3 sigmas with 100 data points.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by calculating optimal f value based on cumulative probability distribution parameters, then divide total account equity by the f value to determine contracts to trade.
